brands.name: LinkedIn
brands.colorUsage: LinkedIn Blue for ALL interactive elements. Warm beige background (#F3F2EF) is signature — never pure white page bg. Gold for Premium features. Green dot for 'available' status. Professional, muted palette throughout.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 32px/1.2 • H2: 24px/1.25 • H3: 18px/1.3 • Body: 14px/1.43 • Small: 12px/1.33 • Name (Card): 16px/1.25 Bold. Compact for information density.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Card padding: 16px. Feed gap: 8px. Section margins: 24px. Sidebar width: 225px left, 300px right. Feed max-width: 544px.
brands.components:
• Cards: White bg, rounded (8px), subtle shadow
• Post: Author header + content + engagement bar
• Profile: Banner + avatar (overlay) + info sections
• Avatar: Circle, 48px posts / 72px cards / 152px profile
• Connection buttons: Blue outline or filled
• Reactions: Like + Celebrate + Support + Love + Insightful + Funny
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: No shadow (inline content)
• Level 1: 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 4px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)
• Level 2: 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)
• Cards always have subtle border + shadow
brands.motion: Professional, restrained. Duration: 150-200ms. Post reactions: Quick pop. Profile visits: Tab slide. Notifications: Slide in. Skeleton loading for content. No playful animations.
brands.layout: 3-column: Left sidebar (225px), Feed (544px), Right sidebar (300px). Profile: Full-width header, sectioned content. Mobile: Single column, bottom tabs.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1128px): Full 3-column, sidebars visible
• Laptop (992-1128px): Right sidebar collapses
• Tablet (768-992px): Single column with top nav
• Mobile (<768px): Full-width, bottom tab bar, collapsible nav
brands.iconStyle: Simple line icons, 24px. 1.5px stroke. Professional, clear. Custom LinkedIn icons for features. Reaction icons are colorful and expressive.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background darken, underline for text links
• Focus: Blue outline ring (2px)
• Active: Slight scale down
• Connect sent: Checkmark + 'Pending'
• Reactions: Color-coded hover previews
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Avatar: 48px in posts, 72px in cards, 152px on profile
• Banner: 1584x396px (4:1), cropped responsively
• Post images: Max 1:1 or 16:9, rounded (8px)
• Video: 16:9, native player
• Document carousel: Slides with navigation arrows
• Company logos: Square, 48-72px
brands.copyVoice: Professional, career-focused. 'Connect with professionals.' Thought leadership tone. Third-person for profiles. Accomplishment-oriented. Business jargon accepted. Trust and credibility.

brands.name: Dropbox
brands.colorUsage: Blue for primary actions and brand. Bold accent colors (pink, yellow, purple) for marketing and illustration — NOT in product UI. Product is clean, minimal. Warm grays (beige-tinted). Creative brand positioning.

typography.headings: Sharp Grotesk Bold / Atlas Grotesk Bold

brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Card padding: 16-24px. Section margins: 48-64px. File list: 12px row padding. Grid gap: 16-24px. Max-width: 1120px content.
brands.components:
• File browser: List or grid view, thumbnail previews
• Folder cards: Icon + name + metadata
• Upload dropzone: Dashed border, drag state
• Share modal: User search + permissions
• Buttons: Rounded (4px), blue primary, 36px height
• Progress: Blue fill bar, percentage
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: No shadow (flat file list)
• Level 1: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1) — Cards
• Level 2: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1) — Dropdowns
• Level 3: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15) — Modals
• Dropzone active: Blue dashed border glow
brands.motion: Smooth, professional. Duration: 200-300ms. Upload: Progress bar + success checkmark. File operations: Optimistic updates. Drag: Ghost with shadow. Playful illustrations on empty states.
brands.layout: File browser: Left nav (folders), main content (files grid/list), preview panel optional. Responsive: Sidebar collapses. Mobile: Tab navigation.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1024px): Full sidebar, file browser, preview pane
• Tablet (768-1024px): Sidebar as overlay
• Mobile (<768px): Bottom tabs, full-width file list, simplified actions
brands.iconStyle: Custom Dropbox icons, 24px. Rounded, friendly style. File type icons are recognizable. Blue folder icon is signature. Illustrations are bold, colorful.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background highlight, show actions
• Focus: Blue outline ring
• Selected: Blue background tint, checkmark
• Dragging: Ghost element, drop target highlight
• Uploading: Progress overlay
brands.mediaPatterns:
• File thumbnails: Square (1:1), rounded (4px)
• Preview: Full-width, native aspect ratio
• Illustrations: Bold shapes, brand colors, playful
• Icons: 24px default, 48px in empty states
• Avatar: Circle, 32-40px
brands.copyVoice: Creative, collaborative. 'Your work anywhere.' Second-person. Friendly, not corporate. File management made human. Team collaboration emphasis.

brands.name: Zoom
brands.colorUsage: Blue for primary actions. Meeting UI is dark (gray-900 or darker). Red for destructive (end call, mute indicator). Green for connected/success. Simple, clear color coding. Minimize distractions during calls.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 36px/1.2 • H2: 28px/1.25 • H3: 20px/1.3 • Body: 14px/1.5 • Small: 12px/1.33 • Meeting name: 18px/1.3. Compact for UI density.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Controls bar: 48-56px height. Participant tiles: 4px gap. Settings padding: 16px. Modal padding: 24px. Meeting controls: Center-aligned.
brands.components:
• Video tile: Participant video, name overlay bottom-left
• Controls bar: Center icons (mute, video, share, etc), dark bg
• Participant panel: List with avatars, status icons
• Chat: Message bubbles, timestamp
• Buttons: Rounded (4px), blue primary, 36px height
• Join form: Meeting ID input, name, join button
brands.elevation:
• Video tiles: No shadow (flat grid)
• Control bar: Subtle shadow above when at bottom
• Panels: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)
• Modals: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)
brands.motion: Minimal, functional. Video connect/disconnect: Fade. Screen share: Instant switch. Hand raise: Bounce. Reactions: Float up and fade. Duration: 150-200ms. No distracting animations.
brands.layout: Meeting: Full-screen video grid (gallery) or speaker view. Controls bottom center. Participants/chat panels slide from right. Floating self-view. Settings: Tabbed modal.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1024px): Gallery view with many tiles, side panels
• Tablet (768-1024px): Fewer tiles, compact controls
• Mobile (<768px): Speaker view default, swipe for participants, bottom sheet panels
brands.iconStyle: Simple, clear icons, 24px. Rounded style. Mic, Video, Share, Participants, Chat, React, End. Red slash for muted. Instant recognition required.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Icon background highlight
• Muted: Red slash on icon, text indicator
• Speaking: Green ring around video tile
• Hand raised: Yellow hand icon
• Screen sharing: Green border on sharer
• Reactions: Emoji overlay on video tile
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Video tiles: 16:9, object-fit cover, name overlay
• Gallery view: Auto-grid, maximize tiles
• Speaker view: Large speaker, small filmstrip
• Screen share: Full-width, optional thumbnail view
• Virtual backgrounds: Behind participant, edge detect
• Profile photos: Circle, shown when video off
brands.copyVoice: Clear, simple, inclusive. 'Start Meeting.' 'Join with Computer Audio.' Minimal jargon. Accessibility-conscious. 'We're here to help.' Enterprise-ready but consumer-friendly.

brands.name: Asana
brands.colorUsage: Coral for primary CTAs and brand. Rainbow palette for project colors, tags, and status. Cream/beige background signature (NOT white). Colorful but organized. Celebration moments use color bursts.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 28px/1.2 • H2: 22px/1.25 • H3: 18px/1.3 • Body: 13px/1.46 • Small: 11px/1.4 • Task name: 14px/1.4. Compact for task density.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px. Task row: 36-44px height. Card padding: 12-16px. Section gaps: 24px. Sidebar: 240px. Project header: 48px.
brands.components:
• Task row: Checkbox + name + assignee avatar + due date + tags
• Project views: List, Board, Timeline, Calendar
• Board columns: Header + card stack, drag between
• My Tasks: Inbox-style list, sections
• Buttons: Rounded (4px), coral primary, 32px height
• Tags: Colored pills, small (22px height)
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: No shadow (inline tasks)
• Level 1: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1) — Cards on board
• Level 2: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15) — Task detail pane
• Level 3: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.2) — Modals
brands.motion: Delightful, celebratory. Task complete: Checkmark animation + confetti burst. Drag: Smooth card following cursor. Duration: 200-300ms. Celebration creatures (unicorns!) on milestones. Engaging but not distracting.
brands.layout: Sidebar (240px) + Main content. List view: Single column tasks. Board view: Kanban columns. Timeline: Gantt-style. Task detail: Slide-over panel right.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1100px): Full sidebar, all views available
• Tablet (768-1100px): Sidebar collapses to icons
• Mobile (<768px): Bottom tabs, simplified task views, gesture navigation
brands.iconStyle: Custom Asana icons, 16-24px. Rounded, friendly. Checkmark is signature. Status icons match project colors. Three dots logo is recognizable.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Row highlight, show actions
• Focus: Blue outline ring
• Complete: Checkmark animation + gray strikethrough
• Drag: Card lifts with shadow
• Celebration: Confetti burst, flying creatures
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Avatar: Circle, 24px inline, 32px task detail, 48px profile
• Cover images: Project covers, 16:9
• Attachments: Preview thumbnails, file type icons
• Timeline: Horizontal bars, dates on axis
• Charts: Progress donuts, colorful
brands.copyVoice: Encouraging, team-focused. 'Work together effortlessly.' Celebrate wins. Action-oriented ('Add task', 'Mark complete'). Productivity-positive. Collaboration language.
designPrinciples: Multiple views, one source of truth

brands.name: Trello
brands.colorUsage: Boards have custom background colors/images. Cards are always white (light) or dark surface (dark mode). Labels are rainbow palette. Blue for primary actions. Keep cards clean — color is in labels and backgrounds.
brands.typographyScale: Board name: 18px/1.3 • List name: 14px/1.2 Bold • Card title: 14px/1.3 • Description: 14px/1.5 • Labels: 12px/1.2. Simple, readable scale.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Card padding: 8px. List padding: 4px. List gap: 8px. Card gap: 8px. Board margin: 8-16px.
brands.components:
• Board: Background + columns (lists)
• List: Header (name + menu) + cards stack
• Card: Labels + cover (optional) + title + badges
• Card badges: Due date, comments, attachments, checklist progress
• Labels: Colored pills, 8px height, text optional
• Checklist: Progress bar + items
brands.elevation:
• Cards: 0 1px 0 rgba(9,30,66,0.25) (subtle bottom shadow)
• Card drag: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)
• Modals: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)
• Lists have no shadow (flat)
brands.motion: Smooth, card-focused. Card drag: Instant grab, smooth move. Drop: Settle into place. Modal: Slide up. Duration: 150-250ms. Butler animations for automation.
brands.layout: Horizontal scrolling board. Lists as vertical columns (272px width). Cards stack vertically. Card detail: Modal overlay. Workspace: Board grid.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1024px): Full board, horizontal scroll
• Tablet (768-1024px): Same layout, touch-friendly
• Mobile (<768px): Single list view, swipe between lists, card detail full-screen
brands.iconStyle: Simple icons, 16-20px. Rounded, friendly. Due date calendar, comment bubble, attachment clip, checklist checkbox. Trello logo is blue gradient.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Card lightens, show edit pencil
• Focus: Blue outline ring
• Drag: Card lifts, placeholder shows
• Due soon: Yellow badge
• Overdue: Red badge
• Complete: Green checkmark
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Card covers: Top of card, cropped image or solid color
• Backgrounds: Full-bleed, image or gradient, darkened for readability
• Attachments: Thumbnail previews on card back
• Avatar: Circle, 28px on cards, 32-40px in menus
• Power-Up icons: 24px, branded
brands.copyVoice: Simple, flexible. 'Boards, lists, cards.' No jargon. Empowering individuals and teams. 'Move work forward.' Template-oriented. Butler for automation.

brands.name: Monzo
brands.colorUsage: Hot Coral is THE brand — the physical card is coral. Coral for CTAs sparingly. Lime for money in, red hints for overspending. Navy for serious content. Clean, trustworthy palette. Coral glow effects occasionally.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 32px/1.2 • H2: 24px/1.25 • H3: 18px/1.3 • Body: 16px/1.5 • Small: 14px/1.4 • Amount: 32-48px Bold. Clear for financial data.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Card padding: 16px. Transaction row: 64px height. Section gaps: 24px. Screen padding: 16px. Bottom nav: 56px.
brands.components:
• Transaction row: Merchant icon + name + amount + category color
• Balance card: Large amount, trend indicator
• Spending pie: Colorful category breakdown
• Pots: Rounded cards with progress toward goal
• Buttons: Rounded-full (pill), coral primary, 48px height
• Account card: Physical card preview, coral
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: No shadow (flat design)
• Level 1: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08) — Cards
• Level 2: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12) — Modals
• Coral card: Subtle coral glow on hover
brands.motion: Smooth, reassuring. Balance update: Number animation. Payments: Success tick + haptic. Pull to refresh: Custom coral spinner. Duration: 200-300ms. Notifications: Instant push.
brands.layout: Mobile-first app. Tab bar bottom. Feed: Transaction list. Summary: Spending breakdown. Pots: Savings goals. Full-screen modals for actions.
brands.responsive:
• Mobile (primary): Single column, bottom tabs, 16px padding
• Tablet: Larger cards, same structure
• Desktop (web): Centered container, sidebar for navigation
brands.iconStyle: Custom Monzo icons, 24px. Rounded, friendly. Category icons (groceries, transport, etc) are distinct. Coral accents on icons sparingly.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background highlight (web)
• Active: Scale 0.98
• Loading: Coral spinner
• Success: Green checkmark animation
• Failed: Red X with explanation
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Merchant logos: Circle, 40px, brand colors
• Card preview: Physical card mockup, coral
• Spending charts: Colorful pie/bar charts
• Empty states: Friendly illustrations
• Avatars: Circle for contacts/payees
brands.copyVoice: Friendly, transparent, British. 'The bank that has your back.' Clear about fees (or lack of). Community tone. 'Make money work for everyone.' Plain language for finance.

brands.name: Revolut
brands.colorUsage: Blue for primary interactive elements. Dark mode is polished and premium. Purple/gold for premium tiers (Metal, Ultra). Green for gains, red for spending. Clean, fintech aesthetic. Gradient accents for marketing.
brands.typographyScale: H1: 32px/1.15 • H2: 24px/1.2 • H3: 18px/1.25 • Body: 15px/1.5 • Small: 13px/1.4 • Amount: 40px/1.0 Bold. Clean financial typography.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Card padding: 16-20px. Transaction row: 60px. Section gaps: 24px. Screen padding: 20px. Nav height: 56px.
brands.components:
• Account card: Balance + currency + card preview
• Transaction: Merchant + category icon + amount + date
• Currency exchange: From/To fields, rate display
• Crypto widget: Price chart, buy/sell buttons
• Buttons: Rounded (8px), blue primary, 48px height
• Cards: Rounded (12px), subtle shadow
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: No shadow (dark mode default)
• Level 1: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1) — Cards
• Level 2: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15) — Sheets
• Premium cards: Subtle gradient shimmer
brands.motion: Polished, premium. Card flip: 3D rotation. Balance: Animated numbers. Exchange rates: Real-time updates. Duration: 200-300ms. Charts: Smooth drawing.
brands.layout: Tab bar bottom. Home: Accounts + quick actions + spending. Cards: Stack view. Crypto/Stocks: Chart + portfolio. Full-screen for payments.
brands.responsive:
• Mobile (primary): Single column, bottom tabs, 20px padding
• Tablet: Two-column layout, sidebar
• Desktop: Web app with left sidebar, dashboard layout
brands.iconStyle: Clean line icons, 24px. 1.5px stroke. Custom category icons. Premium icons for Metal/Ultra. Currency flags for multi-currency.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background highlight
• Active: Scale 0.98
• Loading: Blue spinner
• Success: Green checkmark
• Premium: Gradient shimmer on hover
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Card designs: Physical card previews, multiple colors/materials
• Charts: Line charts for stocks/crypto, minimal axes
• Flags: Currency flags, circle crop
• Merchant logos: Square or circle, 40px
• Premium badges: Metal sheen, gradient
brands.copyVoice: Global, financial freedom. 'One app, all things money.' Multi-currency focus. Tech-forward language. Premium tier emphasis. 'Unlock your money.'

brands.name: Wise
brands.colorUsage: Bright green (#9FE870) is signature — very distinctive. Navy for dark sections and serious content. White backgrounds default. Green for CTAs, success, and brand moments. Yellow/orange for warnings. Clean, trustworthy.
brands.typographyScale: Display: 56px/1.1 • H1: 40px/1.15 • H2: 28px/1.2 • H3: 20px/1.25 • Body: 16px/1.5 • Small: 14px/1.4 • Rate display: 24px Bold.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Card padding: 24px. Form fields: 12px vertical gap. Section margins: 48px. Max-width: 560px forms, 1200px page.
brands.components:
• Transfer form: Amount inputs, currency selectors, rate display
• Rate comparison: Bank vs Wise, savings highlighted
• Progress tracker: Steps with checkmarks
• Currency selector: Flag + code + name
• Buttons: Rounded (8px), green primary, 48px height
• Cards: Rounded (16px), white, subtle shadow
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: No shadow (flat)
• Level 1: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08) — Cards
• Level 2: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12) — Dropdowns
• Level 3: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.15) — Modals
brands.motion: Clear, purposeful. Rate updates: Smooth number transitions. Transfer progress: Step-by-step reveal. Duration: 200-300ms. Savings counter: Animated on load.
brands.layout: Transfer flow: Centered form (560px max). Dashboard: Account overview + transactions. Multi-currency: Tabbed account views. Mobile: Single column, sticky CTAs.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1024px): Centered forms, side illustrations
• Tablet (768-1024px): Full-width forms, stacked layout
• Mobile (<768px): Single column, bottom CTA, simplified inputs
brands.iconStyle: Custom Wise icons, 24px. Rounded, friendly. Currency flags (circle). Progress checkmarks. Arrow for transfers. Simple and clear.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background darken for buttons
• Focus: Green outline ring
• Active: Scale 0.98
• Success: Green checkmark animation
• Error: Orange/red highlight with message
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Currency flags: Circle, 24px inline, 40px in selectors
• Rate charts: Line charts over time
• Card designs: Physical card preview, green accent
• Illustrations: Simple, flat, green accents
• Trust badges: Partners, security certifications
brands.copyVoice: Transparent, mission-driven. 'Money without borders.' Clear about fees. Comparison language (vs banks). 'The cheap, fast way to send money abroad.' Trustworthy, no hidden fees.
